headline: Intel earnings loom as investors watch jobs data and corporate results
summary: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton lays out what investors need to watch on Thursday, July 22, including key earnings reports from Intel (INTC), RTX Corporation (RTX), T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS), along with the latest reading on initial jobless claims as markets look for clues on the health of the economy.

headline: T-Mobile customers face new restriction when paying bills
summary: T-Mobile is enforcing a new rule that will affect how some customers pay their monthly bills, adding to a series of significant changes the company has implemented in recent weeks. headline: Prediction: After a Record Quarter, Here’s Where AT&T Will End The Year
summary: AT&T just posted its fifth straight earnings beat while accelerating buybacks to $10 billion, but the stock still sits nearly 20% below its 52-week high. Whether that gap closes depends on two risks that bulls keep brushing aside.

headline: Get More from Samsung’s New Galaxy Foldables at T-Mobile
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., July 22, 2026--Samsung's newest Galaxy devices deserve the best wireless experience to match. T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) today announced Samsung's full summer lineup — the new Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Flip8, Galaxy Watch9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra2 — is coming to T-Mobile with pre-orders starting today and availability on August 7.
